name: Zucchini Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cheese, Monterey Jack (cut into 1/4-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the green chiles by finely chopping them.
2. Dice the zucchini and corn as needed.
3. Cook all ingredients together until heated through.
4. Stir in milk and cheese before serving.
5. Garnish with a sprinkle of ground nutmeg and fresh parsley.
